40742079-06f5-48f1-8e8e-2b80ae9880e8.name: controller
40742079-06f5-48f1-8e8e-2b80ae9880e8.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'controller')) FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'controller_runtime_reconcile_total' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'controller') != ''

9eb06b6d-724c-4804-922b-163cce3f4d29.name: namespace
9eb06b6d-724c-4804-922b-163cce3f4d29.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace')) FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name IN ('resource_apply_total', 'resource_delete_total') AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace') != ''

b489a458-3834-4068-87fa-ab226694f835.name: runner
b489a458-3834-4068-87fa-ab226694f835.queryValue: SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'runner')) FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4 WHERE metric_name = 'watchable_subscribe_total' AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'runner') != ''
